backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for a school inventory/billing system with functions to add/update inventory items, create bills, query bills by date, and retrieve summary totals.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (login, dashboard, inventory, billing, reports) to their corresponding frontend source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of each component, page, hook, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, sidebar, charts, and UI primitives.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Global Pride International School Stock & Inventory Management' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with a public login route and auth-guarded protected routes (dashboard, inventory, billing, reports) wrapped in a Layout component.
frontend/src/components/BillLineItem.tsx: Single billing line item component with an item selector dropdown, quantity input, unit price display, auto-calculated subtotal, stock validation error message, and a remove button.
frontend/src/components/EditItemModal.ts: Dialog modal for editing an existing inventory item's name, category, quantity, and price, with validation and a backend updateItem mutation call.
frontend/src/components/InventoryTable.t: Renders a table of inventory items with name, category, quantity (color-coded for low/zero stock), price, and action buttons for editing or adding stock.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app shell with a collapsible sidebar navigation (Dashboard, Inventory, Billing, Reports), a top header bar, and an Outlet for nested routes.
frontend/src/components/Login.tsx: Login page component with username/password form that calls the auth login hook and redirects to the dashboard on success, showing an error alert on failure.
frontend/src/components/PrintableBill.ts: Print-only receipt component displaying student name, payment mode, itemized bill rows, and grand total formatted in INR, hidden from screen view.
frontend/src/components/RemainingStockTa: Displays a read-only table of inventory items showing name, category, and remaining stock quantity with color coding for low or zero stock.
frontend/src/components/ReportSummary.ts: Shows three summary stat cards for grand total, total units sold, and total income using icons and INR-formatted values.
frontend/src/components/SalesTable.tsx: Renders a table of sales rows with item name, quantity sold, and amount earned in INR, with an empty-state message when no records exist.
frontend/src/components/SummaryCard.tsx: Reusable stat card component displaying a title, value, optional subtitle, and a configurable icon with loading skeleton support.
frontend/src/components/UpdateStockModal: Modal dialog for adding additional stock quantity to an existing inventory item, showing the new total and calling the update mutation on confirm.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Provides simple hardcoded username/password authentication with session state stored in localStorage, exposing login, logout, and isAuthenticated functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity state, login/logout functions, and status flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching inventory items, adding/updating items, creating bills, fetching bills by date, and retrieving dashboard totals.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines a comprehensive set of CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including brand, semantic, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/src/lib/constants.ts: Exports a static array of product category strings used throughout the application.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a cn utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Billing.tsx: Billing page component that allows users to create student bills by selecting inventory items and quantities, calculates totals, submits to the backend, and displays a printable bill on success.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page that displays four summary cards showing total inventory items, available stock, units sold today, and today's income, along with a quick-start guide.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Inventory page that renders a form to add new items (name, category, quantity, price) and displays existing items in a table with edit and stock-update modals. Uses React Query hooks for data fetching and mutation, with toast notifications for feedback.
frontend/src/pages/Reports.tsx: Reports page that lets the user pick a date and displays aggregated sales data (units sold, income, grand total) alongside a remaining stock table, pulling data from billing and inventory query hooks.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens (brand, sidebar, chart, semantic colors), custom border radii, box shadows, fonts, and accordion keyframe animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the Stock & Inventory Management System's features, architecture, and version history, including login credentials, ICP backend usage, billing rules, and implemented feature list.
